case_title: CCSF OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPT. OF PUBLIC WORKS VS PURNELL, PAUTIE A.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO PAUTIE PURNELL RETURNED, MOVED, LEFT NO ADDRESS.
